response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video for vocal music tracks. 2. Identified game background music (instrumental only) and VTuber spoken commentary. 3. Concluded that no vocal musical performances occur in the video. 4. Mapped the video into three segments based on gameplay activity (combat, clear, post-combat organization). 5. Populated the JSON schema with this data.
response.global_summary: A Minecraft gameplay video featuring a group of VTubers engaged in dungeon combat followed by post-combat activities including inventory management, banking, and strategic planning. There is no vocal music in this video, only in-game ambient music and spoken commentary.

scenes.description: The players are fighting a monster in a Minecraft dungeon.
The dungeon is cleared, and the screen displays 'CLEAR'.
The players discuss the loot, manage their inventory, visit an ATM, and talk about their in-game jobs.
